title: Muskavocado Crunch
description: A garlicky and crunchy British dish featuring muscovado sugar in a mediterranean-friendly twist, perfect for adventurous eaters.
instructions: Peel and pit the avocado, then chop it into cubes.
Mince the garlic cloves finely with a microplane or using a press.
In a small mixing bowl, combine the minced garlic, muscovado sugar, black pepper, olive oil, and lime juice. Mix until well combined and there are no lumps of sugar left.
Add the avocado cubes to the spice mixture and stir gently but thoroughly so they're evenly coated with the dressing.
Transfer the avocado-muscovado-crouton mix to a serving dish or shallow container for easy snacking.
